hero.quote: Where Beauty Blooms Like Cherry Blossoms
hero.title: Sakura
hero.subtitle: salon
hero.description: Welcome to Sakura Salon, your cozy retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. Experience our range of services designed to pamper you from head to toe.

premium.title: Premium Products
premium.description: Organic and natural beauty products for the best care

experts.title: Expert Stylists
experts.description: Professional team with years of experience

relaxing.title: Relaxing Atmosphere
relaxing.description: Peaceful environment for your complete relaxation

exclusiveServices.sameInfo: Contact me from the same Info

japaneseHeadSpa.title: Japanese Head Spa
japaneseHeadSpa.description: Indulge in the ultimate relaxation with our authentic Japanese Head Spa. Combining traditional techniques with modern care, this treatment includes scalp massage, deep cleansing, aromatherapy, and stress relief. Perfect for rejuvenating your mind and restoring scalp health.

dryHeadSpa.title: Dry Head SPA
dryHeadSpa.description: Experience deep relaxation with our Dry Head SPA - a specialized treatment focusing on acupressure, stress relief, and pain release. This soothing session includes head, neck, and shoulder massage, promoting better sleep and mental clarity without water or products.

imperialRetreat.title: The imperial retreat
imperialRetreat.description: Experience deep relaxation and scalp rejuvenation with our exclusive IMPERIAL RETREAT. Enjoy a luxurious 120-minute session featuring Japanese head spa techniques, aromatherapy, hot towel treatment, nourishing hair masks, shoulder & arm massage, and a refreshing herbal tea. Complete bliss for mind and body.

nailArt.title: Premium Nail Art
nailArt.description: Transform your nails into stunning works of art with our premium nail art services. From classic French manicures to intricate designs, gel polish, nail extensions, and custom artwork. Our skilled technicians use high-quality products for long-lasting, beautiful results.

lashExtension.title: Lash Extensions
lashExtension.description: Enhance your natural beauty with our professional lash extension services. Choose from classic, volume, or hybrid styles using premium silk lashes. Our certified lash artists create customized looks that complement your eye shape for stunning, natural-looking results.

browStyling.title: Eyebrow Styling
browStyling.description: Perfect your brows with our comprehensive eyebrow styling services. Includes shaping, threading, tinting, and microblading consultations. Our expert stylists create the ideal brow shape to frame your face and enhance your natural features.

gallery.subtitle: Explore our beautiful transformations and serene spa atmosphere

testimonials.subtitle: Hear from our satisfied clients about their experiences

client1.text: The Japanese Head Spa was absolutely amazing! I felt so relaxed and rejuvenated. The staff is professional and the atmosphere is so peaceful. Highly recommend!

client2.text: Best nail art experience I've ever had! The attention to detail is incredible. My nails look stunning and the service was top-notch. Will definitely come back!

client3.text: I've been coming here for months and every visit is perfect. The lash extensions are beautiful and last so long. The team really knows what they're doing!

contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out for bookings or inquiries
contact.hoursDetails: Mon-Sat: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM | Sun: 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM

form.name: Your Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...

footer.about: Experience authentic Japanese relaxation and beauty services in a serene atmosphere. Your journey to wellness begins here.

chatbot.welcome: Hello! Welcome to Sakura Saloon. How can I help you today?

responses.bookings: Great! You can book an appointment by calling us at +1 (555) 123-4567 or clicking the 'Book Now' button on our website. We're available Mon-Sat 9AM-8PM.
responses.services: We offer Japanese Head Spa, Nail Art & Extensions, Lash Extensions, and Eyebrow Styling. Each service is performed by our expert team in a serene atmosphere. Would you like to know more about a specific service?
responses.pricing: Our pricing varies by service. Head Spa starts at $80, Nail services from $45, and Lash Extensions from $120. Contact us for detailed pricing and package deals!
responses.hours: We're open Monday to Saturday: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM, and Sunday: 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM. Walk-ins welcome, but appointments are recommended!
responses.location: We're located at 123 Sakura Street, Beauty District. Easy parking available and just 5 minutes from downtown. See you soon!

hero.title: About Sakura Saloon
hero.subtitle: Where Japanese tradition meets modern beauty

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2018, Sakura Saloon was born from a passion for authentic Japanese beauty rituals and a vision to create a sanctuary of tranquility in the heart of the city.
story.paragraph2: Our founder, inspired by traditional Japanese wellness practices, sought to bring the serene experience of a Japanese spa to our community. Every detail, from our signature Head Spa treatments to our carefully curated nail art, reflects our commitment to authenticity and excellence.
story.paragraph3: Today, we're proud to be a destination where clients discover the perfect balance of relaxation, beauty, and self-care in an atmosphere that honors Japanese aesthetics and hospitality.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We pursue perfection in every service, using premium products and advanced techniques to deliver exceptional results.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.description: We honor traditional Japanese beauty practices while embracing modern innovations to create unique experiences.

wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.description: We believe beauty and wellness are interconnected, focusing on holistic care that nurtures body, mind, and spirit.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously evolve our services and techniques to bring you the latest in beauty and wellness trends.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Skilled professionals dedicated to your beauty journey

member1.name: Yuki Tanaka
member1.description: With over 15 years of experience in Japanese wellness practices, Yuki brings authentic techniques and passion to every treatment.

member2.name: Sakura Yamamoto
member2.description: Trained in Tokyo's finest salons, Sakura creates stunning nail art that combines precision with creativity.

member3.name: Hana Suzuki
member3.description: Specializing in natural-looking enhancements, Hana has perfected the art of lash extensions and eyebrow styling.

cta.title: Experience the Sakura Difference
cta.description: Book your appointment today and discover why our clients keep coming back

spa.title: Japanese Head Spa & Relaxation
spa.description: Immerse yourself in the ancient art of Japanese head spa - a soothing ritual designed to melt stress, improve scalp health, and restore inner peace. Experience our professional and refreshing treatment, crafted with care, and leave feeling rejuvenated and balanced.

beauty.title: Beauty Care: Nails, Lashes & Brows
beauty.description: Elevate your elegance with our bespoke beauty services, from flawless nails and gorgeous lashes to perfectly shaped brows. Achieve your natural charm, shine into a world-class experience with confidence, and let your beauty bloom like cherry blossoms.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Exclusive range of packages to please your needs

backFacial.name: Back Facial
backFacial.description: Exfoliation + Leg Massage Hot Towel Opens pores and softens the skin for better absorption. Back Exfoliation Gently buffs away dead skin.

faceRejuvenation.name: Face Rejuvenation
faceRejuvenation.description: Advanced facial treatment with deep cleansing, exfoliation, and hydrating mask for radiant, youthful skin.

traditionalMassage.name: Traditional Massage
traditionalMassage.description: Authentic Japanese massage techniques to relieve tension and promote deep relaxation throughout your body.

aromatherapy.name: Aromatherapy Session
aromatherapy.description: Therapeutic aromatherapy with essential oils to calm the mind and rejuvenate the spirit.

imperialRetreat.name: Imperial Retreat
imperialRetreat.description: Luxurious 120-minute head spa ritual featuring aromatherapy, nourishing hair masks, and herbal tea for complete rejuvenation.

zenHeadSpa.name: Zen Head Spa
zenHeadSpa.description: Mind-calming scalp treatment with acupressure, cooling botanicals, and guided breathing to restore balance.

sakuraSteam.name: Sakura Steam Therapy
sakuraSteam.description: Gentle steam infusion with cherry blossom essences to detoxify the scalp and revive natural shine.

crystalScalpMassage.name: Crystal Scalp Massage
crystalScalpMassage.description: Warm crystal rollers, scalp kneading, and aromatic oils to release deep-rooted stress and tension.

silkHeadTreatment.name: Silk Head Treatment
silkHeadTreatment.description: Silkening serum, scalp exfoliation, and restorative massage to leave hair soft, glossy, and healthy.

midnightCalm.name: Midnight Calm Ritual
midnightCalm.description: Evening-inspired ritual with lavender compresses and slow rhythm massage to prepare you for restful sleep.

forestBreeze.name: Forest Breeze Therapy
forestBreeze.description: Forest-inspired aromatherapy, pressure-point massage, and herbal mist to refresh mind and senses.

serenityStone.name: Serenity Stone Massage
serenityStone.description: Heated basalt stones glide across the scalp, melting away tension while nourishing oils soak in.

kansoTherapy.name: Kanso Therapy
kansoTherapy.description: Traditional kanso wand massage that stimulates energy flow and promotes total scalp clarity.

reviveEnergy.name: Revive Energy Boost
reviveEnergy.description: Invigorating peppermint cleanse, scalp brushing, and energizing massage for instant refreshment.

samuraiFocus.name: Samurai Focus Treatment
samuraiFocus.description: Focus-enhancing ritual with camphor-infused oils, firm pressure techniques, and cooling tonics.

deepSleepRitual.name: Deep Sleep Ritual
deepSleepRitual.description: Slow, hypnotic scalp strokes, warm herbal poultices, and sound bath elements for deeper rest.

blossomScalpPolish.name: Blossom Scalp Polish
blossomScalpPolish.description: Gentle sakura scrub, vitamin serum, and scalp massage to brighten hair follicles and skin.

shizukuHydration.name: Shizuku Hydration
shizukuHydration.description: Ultra-hydrating serum infusion, steam therapy, and lymphatic drainage massage for lasting moisture.

teawareInfusion.name: Teaware Infusion
teawareInfusion.description: Green tea detox rinse, scalp stretching, and finishing tonic for clarity and lightness.

auroraHeadLuminance.name: Aurora Head Luminance
auroraHeadLuminance.description: Chromotherapy-inspired treatment with iridescent masks and revitalizing scalp massage to boost radiance.

classicManicure.name: Classic Manicure
classicManicure.description: Nail shaping, cuticle care, hand massage, and polish application with your choice of color.

gelManicure.name: Gel Manicure
gelManicure.description: Long-lasting gel polish that maintains shine and durability for weeks without chipping.

acrylicSet.name: Acrylic Full Set
acrylicSet.description: Complete acrylic nail extensions with custom shaping and professional polish application.

classicLashes.name: Classic Lash Extensions
classicLashes.description: Natural-looking lash extensions applied one-to-one. Perfect for everyday elegance and subtle enhancement.

volumeLashes.name: Volume Lashes
volumeLashes.description: Dramatic volume lashes using multiple extensions per natural lash for fuller, glamorous look.

browShaping.name: Eyebrow Shaping
browShaping.description: Professional eyebrow shaping and grooming to frame your face perfectly with precise techniques.

aromatherapySession.name: Aromatherapy Session
aromatherapySession.description: Relaxing aromatherapy treatment with essential oils to soothe your mind and rejuvenate your senses.

classicManicure.name: Classic Manicure
classicManicure.description: Traditional manicure with nail shaping, cuticle care, and polish application for beautiful hands.

luxuryManicure.name: Luxury Manicure
luxuryManicure.description: Premium manicure experience with exfoliation, moisturizing treatment, and long-lasting polish.

gelNails.name: Gel Nails
gelNails.description: Durable gel nail treatment with chip-resistant finish that lasts up to 3 weeks.

classicLashes.name: Classic Lashes
classicLashes.description: Natural-looking lash extensions with one extension per natural lash for subtle enhancement.

browTinting.name: Brow Tinting
browTinting.description: Professional eyebrow tinting to enhance and define your brows with long-lasting color.
